channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump, Mamdani give contrasting July 4th speeches. And, U.S. faces Belgium in World Cup
item.description: For the nation's 250th birthday, President Trump and NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani had opposing visions of America. And, the U.S. and Belgium face off today in the FIFA World Cup.
item.content:encoded:
For the nation's 250th birthday, President Trump and NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani had opposing visions of America. And, the U.S. and Belgium face off today in the FIFA World Cup.

(Image credit: Alex Wroblewski)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: These Medicare beneficiaries thought their drug plan was free. Then they lost it
item.description: Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in delinquent payments. They didn't know their zero-dollar premiums had gone up and they owed money. Most now can't get coverage until 2027.
item.content:encoded:
Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in delinquent payments. They didn't know their zero-dollar premiums had gone up and they owed money. Most now can't get coverage until 2027.  

(Image credit: fstop123/iStockphoto)
item.dc:creator: Susan Jaffe

item.title: Hate food waste? 7 creative ways to turn your leftovers into a new meal
item.description: We asked our audience to share their favorite go-to recipes for leftovers. Here are seven dishes — like stuffed peppers and a biryani casserole — that can help you use up all your fridge scraps.
item.content:encoded:
We asked our audience to share their favorite go-to recipes for leftovers. Here are seven dishes — like stuffed peppers and a biryani casserole — that can help you use up all your fridge scraps.

(Image credit: kaisersosa67/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Malaka Gharib

item.title: Marriage used to be a glide path to citizenship. Now there are more speed bumps
item.description: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.
item.content:encoded:
Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.

(Image credit: Joseph Prezioso)
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo

item.title: Fast walkers in their 80s cut their risk of cognitive decline by half, a study finds
item.description: A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits finds fast walkers have about a 50% lower risk of cognitive decline, showing the connection between physical health and brain health.
item.content:encoded:
A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits finds fast walkers have about a 50% lower risk of cognitive decline, showing the connection between physical health and brain health.

(Image credit: FG Trade)
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: The U.S. faces Belgium in the World Cup on the heels of Trump-Infantino red card call
item.description: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week.

(Image credit: Jamie Squire)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Russian missile and drone attack on Ukraine's capital kills at least 12
item.description: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones at Kyiv early Monday, killing at least 12 people in an attack that exposed widening gaps in Ukraine's air defenses, authorities said.
item.content:encoded:
Russia launched waves of missiles and drones at Kyiv early Monday, killing at least 12 people in an attack that exposed widening gaps in Ukraine's air defenses, authorities said.

(Image credit: Danylo Antoniuk)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump won spending promises from NATO last year. This week, he'll try to enforce them
item.description: President Donald Trump is heading to Ankara, Turkey, for the annual NATO summit. Last year, he pushed NATO allies to spend more on defense. This year, his mission is to try to enforce those pledges.
item.content:encoded:
President Donald Trump is heading to Ankara, Turkey, for the annual NATO summit. Last year, he pushed NATO allies to spend more on defense. This year, his mission is to try to enforce those pledges.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Mexico's World Cup run ends with loss to England at Estadio Azteca
item.description: Playing at altitude with the passionate backing of 80,824 fans at Estadio Azteca, and with a man advantage for most of the second half, Mexico scored twice but could never equalize and lost 3-2.
item.content:encoded:
Playing at altitude with the passionate backing of 80,824 fans at Estadio Azteca, and with a man advantage for most of the second half, Mexico scored twice but could never equalize and lost 3-2.

(Image credit: Natacha Pisarenko)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Y si sí: the phrase uniting Mexico during the World Cup
item.description: Mexico's World Cup run has inspired a phrase heard across the country: "Y si sí." Or in English: "What if we can?" Anamaria Sayre reports from Mexico City.
item.content:encoded: Mexico's World Cup run has inspired a phrase heard across the country: "Y si sí." Or in English: "What if we can?" Anamaria Sayre reports from Mexico City.
item.dc:creator: Anamaria Artemisa Sayre
